problem: Health plans struggle to meet CMS interoperability requirements and exchange patient data across the healthcare ecosystem. Legacy systems cannot handle large-scale FHIR-based data exchange needed for value-based care.
solution: FHIR-native health data platform that enables health plans to meet CMS requirements, reduce operational burden, and turn health data into a strategic advantage. Supports scalable data exchange with enterprise-grade security and tech-agnostic architecture.
